Bullet Point 2: FLAVOR PROFILE WITH CHOCOLATE, NUTTY & FLORAL NOTES: Experience the distinct flavor of Guatemala coffee with nutty, creamy chocolate, and subtle orange undertones. Our dark roast Guatemala coffee beans create a smooth, aromatic brew that coffee enthusiasts cherish.
Bullet Point 3: GUATEMALA COFFEE WITH RESPONSIBLE SOURCING: Our Guatemala organic single origin coffee beans is sourced with care, ensuring the beans are grown with a commitment to environmental and community responsibility. Enjoy each cup knowing it contributes to positive practices.
Bullet Point 4: BALANCED DARK ROAST WHOLE BEAN COFFEE: Enjoy the rich, balanced flavor of Guatemala coffee beans dark roast. These fresh roasted coffee beans deliver a smooth, full-bodied profile that is both satisfying and great for those who appreciate fine coffee.
Bullet Point 5: IDEAL GIFT FOR COFFEE LOVERS: Our Guatemala dark roasted coffee beans makes a thoughtful gift for coffee aficionados. Whether you're looking for a unique coffee gift for men or women, this aromatic dark roast Guatemala coffee is the ideal present for any occasion.

Hailing from the renowned Guatemala country, these single origin coffee whole bean deliver a delightful balance of berry, chocolate, and floral notes. With a dark roast profile, this Guatemala coffee offers a smooth, full-bodied flavor that coffee enthusiasts will appreciate. Our Guatemala coffee beans are carefully roasted, creating a balance of rich taste and aromatic complexity. Whether you prefer brewing whole coffee or using Guatemala coffee ground, the flavor stays robust and satisfying. Packaged in a 12-ounce resealable bag, these fresh roasted coffee beans are designed to maintain their peak freshness, ensuring a consistently great cup each time. Ideal for those who enjoy dark roast coffee, Twiga Coffee's Guatemala coffee beans are an excellent choice for those seeking a unique and flavorful coffee experience. Whether brewed as a whole coffee or ground, this coffee brings a rich, aromatic sip to your daily routine. Twiga Coffee proudly offers Guatemala coffee that reflects our commitment to sustainability and responsible practices. Great for those who enjoy premium, flavorful coffee, this product brings the taste of Guatemala directly to your cup.

Unit: Ounce

overall_summary: Premium single-origin coffee with organic and fairtrade certifications, indicating higher production costs and ethical sourcing.
